positioning_taxonomy.name: Linear
positioning_taxonomy.problem_framing_verbatim: Issue tracking is dead. Traditional tools slow teams down with noise and friction. Product development needs a system built for speed and AI-native workflows.
positioning_taxonomy.solution_framing_verbatim: The product development system for teams and agents. Purpose-built for planning and building products. Designed for the AI era. A new species of product tool that sets a new standard for planning and building products.

positioning_taxonomy.name: Jira
positioning_taxonomy.problem_framing_verbatim: Teams need to reach the next level of productivity with AI agents that orchestrate, plan, and track projects at scale.
positioning_taxonomy.solution_framing_verbatim: Jira brings teams together to reach the next level of productivity with AI agents that orchestrate, plan, and track projects at scale. Project management for the AI era.

positioning_taxonomy.name: Asana
positioning_taxonomy.problem_framing_verbatim: Teams need AI that understands their work, keeps projects moving, and gets better the more teams use it. 85% of Fortune 100 companies choose Asana.
positioning_taxonomy.solution_framing_verbatim: Supercharge your teams with AI that gets work done. Give your teams AI that understands their work, keeps projects moving, and gets better the more your teams use it. The platform for human + AI collaboration.

positioning_taxonomy.name: Notion
positioning_taxonomy.problem_framing_verbatim: Work is fragmented across too many tools. Teams need a single AI workspace that works for them 24/7.
positioning_taxonomy.solution_framing_verbatim: The AI workspace that works for you. Notion agents keep work moving 24/7. They capture knowledge, answer questions, and push projects forward — all while you sleep. Meet the night shift.

positioning_taxonomy.name: ClickUp
positioning_taxonomy.problem_framing_verbatim: 60% of work is lost in context — and AI is lost without it. Work sprawl is killing context and destroying productivity.
positioning_taxonomy.solution_framing_verbatim: Software to replace all software. All Apps, AI, Projects, Chat + 20 more. Save money, save time, create infinite productivity with AI Agents & Workflows. The everything app for work.

pricing_reality.name: Linear
pricing_reality.packaging_notes: Free tier limited to 250 issues + 2 teams. Basic adds 5 teams + unlimited issues. Business adds unlimited teams + guest accounts + triage intelligence + Linear Agent automations. Enterprise adds SAML/SCIM + granular admin + migration support.

pricing_reality.name: Jira
gated_pricing_signals: Enterprise pricing hidden behind sales contact
Annual billing required for Enterprise view
pricing_reality.packaging_notes: Free: 2 GB storage + 100 automation runs/month. Standard: 250 GB + 1,700 automations + 9/5 support. Premium: unlimited storage + per-user automation limits + 24/7 critical support + 99.9% SLA. Enterprise: unlimited automations + up to 150 sites + 99.95% SLA + Atlassian Analytics.

pricing_reality.name: Asana
gated_pricing_signals: Enterprise and Enterprise+ require sales contact
Yearly billing shows 18% savings vs monthly
pricing_reality.packaging_notes: Personal: unlimited tasks & projects + 100MB/file. Starter: timeline/Gantt + dashboards + unlimited automations + custom fields. Advanced: portfolios + goals + workload + time tracking. Enterprise: SAML + SCIM + capacity planning. Enterprise+: data residency + HIPAA + audit log API.

pricing_reality.name: ClickUp
gated_pricing_signals: AI features (Brain) are add-on priced separately on some tiers
pricing_reality.packaging_notes: Free: 100MB storage + unlimited tasks + 24/7 support. Unlimited: unlimited storage + integrations + dashboards. Business: 2FA + Google SSO + custom exporting. Enterprise: white labeling + API + HIPAA. Enterprise Plus: dedicated success manager + custom contracts.

pricing_reality.name: Notion
gated_pricing_signals: AI features (Notion AI) are $10/user/month add-on across all paid plans
pricing_reality.packaging_notes: Free: unlimited blocks for individuals. Plus: unlimited file uploads + 30-day version history. Business: private teamspaces + bulk PDF export. Enterprise: SCIM + audit logs + advanced security. Notion AI is a separate $10/user/month add-on.

communities_owned.name: r/productmanagement
communities_owned.evidence: Linear mentioned in 12+ threads as 'cleanest PM tool' in past 90 days

communities_owned.name: Hacker News
communities_owned.evidence: Linear featured in Show HN and discussed in 'Ask HN: What PM tool do you use?' threads

communities_owned.name: r/startups
communities_owned.evidence: ClickUp and Notion dominate PM tool suggestion threads; Linear gaining traction among technical founders

publications_owned.name: TechCrunch
publications_owned.evidence: Linear coverage on Series C ($35M), AI agent announcements; Notion coverage on valuation ($10B)

publications_owned.name: The Verge
publications_owned.evidence: Notion and Asana featured in productivity roundups; ClickUp in 'best project management software 2024'

evidence_per_claim.claim: Linear owns the 'AI-native PM tool' narrative among early adopters
Asana dominates Fortune 100 mindshare with explicit '85% of Fortune 100' claim
Notion positioned as unified workspace replacing multiple tools
ClickUp claims 'software to replace all software' — broadest positioning
Jira maintains enterprise default status via Atlassian ecosystem lock-in

review_mined_feedback.name: Linear
review_mined_feedback.verbatim_quote: Linear is the first tool that actually feels like it was built for how modern product teams work. The keyboard shortcuts are incredible and the UI is just beautiful. But it's expensive for larger teams.

review_mined_feedback.name: Linear
review_mined_feedback.verbatim_quote: Great for small teams but lacks the reporting and customization that enterprise needs. We're starting to outgrow it at 150 people.

review_mined_feedback.name: Jira
review_mined_feedback.verbatim_quote: Jira is powerful but bloated. Every workflow requires 20 clicks. Our engineers hate it but our PMs insist on it for traceability.

review_mined_feedback.name: Asana
review_mined_feedback.verbatim_quote: Asana works well for marketing teams but our engineering team finds it too flexible — things fall through the cracks without strict workflows.

review_mined_feedback.name: Notion
review_mined_feedback.verbatim_quote: Notion replaced our wiki, docs, and light project management. The AI features are genuinely useful. Setup took weeks though.

review_mined_feedback.name: ClickUp
review_mined_feedback.verbatim_quote: Feature overload. We use maybe 20% of what ClickUp offers. The learning curve is steep and our team was overwhelmed.

competitor_narrative_arc.name: Linear
competitor_narrative_arc.villain: Traditional issue trackers that slow teams down with noise, friction, and manual status updates. Jira's complexity kills velocity.
competitor_narrative_arc.hero: Linear — a system purpose-built for modern product teams with AI workflows at its core. Speed is a feature.
competitor_narrative_arc.transformation_claim: From fragmented project chaos to a self-driving product operation where humans and agents collaborate seamlessly.
competitor_narrative_arc.evidence_verbatim: A new species of product tool. Purpose-built for modern teams with AI workflows at its core, Linear sets a new standard for planning and building products.

competitor_narrative_arc.name: Jira
competitor_narrative_arc.villain: Disconnected teams, siloed information, manual project coordination that doesn't scale.
competitor_narrative_arc.hero: Jira + Atlassian Intelligence — the enterprise standard with AI agents embedded.
competitor_narrative_arc.transformation_claim: From manual project tracking to AI-orchestrated productivity at enterprise scale.
competitor_narrative_arc.evidence_verbatim: Jira brings teams together to reach the next level of productivity with AI agents that orchestrate, plan, and track projects at scale.

competitor_narrative_arc.name: Asana
competitor_narrative_arc.villain: Work that doesn't move — teams stuck in status meetings, unclear priorities, projects that stall.
competitor_narrative_arc.hero: Asana AI Teammates — AI that understands your work and keeps projects moving autonomously.
competitor_narrative_arc.transformation_claim: From human-dependent coordination to AI-augmented teams that achieve goals faster with less manual overhead.
competitor_narrative_arc.evidence_verbatim: Give your teams AI that understands their work, keeps projects moving, and gets better the more your teams use it. 85% of Fortune 100 companies choose Asana.

competitor_narrative_arc.name: Notion
competitor_narrative_arc.villain: Tool sprawl — work scattered across 10+ apps, knowledge lost, context switching destroying focus.
competitor_narrative_arc.hero: Notion — the single AI workspace where everything lives, agents work 24/7, and context is never lost.
competitor_narrative_arc.transformation_claim: From fragmented tools to one AI workspace that replaces docs, wikis, projects, and databases.
competitor_narrative_arc.evidence_verbatim: Notion agents keep work moving 24/7. They capture knowledge, answer questions, and push projects forward — all while you sleep. Meet the night shift.

competitor_narrative_arc.name: ClickUp
competitor_narrative_arc.villain: Work sprawl — 60% of work lost in context, AI lost without it, too many tools killing productivity.
competitor_narrative_arc.hero: ClickUp — the everything app that replaces all software with one platform for humans, AI agents, and workflows.
competitor_narrative_arc.transformation_claim: From software chaos to infinite productivity — one app with 100+ products, AI agents, and perfect context.
competitor_narrative_arc.evidence_verbatim: Software to replace all software. All Apps, AI, Projects, Chat + 20 more. Save money. Save time. Create infinite productivity. AI Agents & Workflows.

organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.name: Linear
organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.homepage_positioning: Purpose-built for modern teams with AI workflows at its core. A new species of product tool.
organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.dominant_ad_hook: Issue tracking is dead / A new species of product tool
organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.delta_description: Minimal delta. Organic and paid messaging are tightly aligned — both emphasize AI-native product development and position Linear as a paradigm shift from traditional issue tracking.

organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.name: Asana
organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.homepage_positioning: Supercharge your teams with AI that gets work done. The platform for human + AI collaboration. 85% of Fortune 100 companies choose Asana.
organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.dominant_ad_hook: 85% of Fortune 100 companies choose Asana / See why teams love Asana
organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.delta_description: Slight delta. Homepage emphasizes AI collaboration capability; paid ads lean harder on social proof (Fortune 100 claim) to reduce perceived risk for enterprise buyers. AI is present in both but paid leads with credibility signal.

organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.name: ClickUp
organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.homepage_positioning: Software to replace all software. All Apps, AI, Projects, Chat + 20 more. Save money, save time, create infinite productivity.
organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.dominant_ad_hook: Software to replace all software / Get 400% more done / One app. Everything.
organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.delta_description: Minimal delta. Both organic and paid positions emphasize consolidation and productivity multiplier. Paid ads use stronger quantified claim (400% more done) not present on homepage.

organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.name: Notion
organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.homepage_positioning: The AI workspace that works for you. Notion agents keep work moving 24/7. Meet the night shift. Trusted by 98% of Forbes Cloud 100.
organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.dominant_ad_hook: Meet the night shift / Notion agents keep work moving 24/7
organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.delta_description: Minimal delta. Both emphasize AI agents and 24/7 autonomous work. Paid ads use the 'night shift' metaphor more prominently; homepage balances it with trust signal (Forbes Cloud 100).

organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.name: Jira
organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.homepage_positioning: Project management for the AI era. Jira brings teams together to reach the next level of productivity with AI agents that orchestrate, plan, and track projects at scale.
organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.dominant_ad_hook: Project management for the AI era / Bring AI to your team with Jira
organic_vs_paid_narrative_delta.delta_description: Minimal delta. Both emphasize AI-era positioning. Paid is slightly more direct-action focused ('Bring AI to your team') versus homepage's broader orchestration narrative.
